context: Tests whether the agent uses the Shopify Bulk Operations API for large-scale product exports rather than paginating manually, correctly polls for completion, and uses the proper library and GID-format IDs.

checklist.name: Uses @shopify/shopify-api
checklist.description: Script imports and uses the `@shopify/shopify-api` package (not raw fetch/axios/got alone), visible in imports or package.json dependencies

checklist.name: Uses bulkOperationRunQuery
checklist.description: Script triggers a bulk export using the `bulkOperationRunQuery` GraphQL mutation rather than paginated queries

checklist.name: Polls currentBulkOperation
checklist.description: Script polls for completion using the `currentBulkOperation` GraphQL query (checking `status` field)

checklist.name: Downloads URL on COMPLETED
checklist.description: Script only fetches the JSONL download URL after the bulk operation status is COMPLETED (not before or with a long delay)

checklist.name: Writes JSONL output
checklist.description: The script writes or is clearly intended to write results to a `.jsonl` file (one JSON object per line)

checklist.name: Uses January25 API version
checklist.description: Code sets the API version to `ApiVersion.January25` or the string `'2025-01'`

checklist.name: Offline session for custom app
checklist.description: Session is created with `isOnline: false` for a custom app with static token

checklist.name: GraphQL client for bulk op
checklist.description: The bulk operation mutation is issued via a GraphQL client (not a REST client)

checklist.name: No manual pagination
checklist.description: Code does NOT use cursor-based pagination (no looping over `pageInfo.hasNextPage` / `endCursor`) as the primary export mechanism for the full catalog

checklist.name: Product fields requested
checklist.description: Bulk operation query requests at least: product id, title, status and variant fields (id, sku, price, inventoryQuantity)
